properties.name: mso-line-height-rule
properties.description: Controls how Outlook calculates line-height. `exactly` forces the line height to the declared value.

properties.name: mso-line-height-alt
properties.description: Alternative line-height value used by Outlook when the standard line-height would not be honoured.

properties.name: mso-text-raise
properties.description: Vertical text offset inside a v:textbox or table cell.

properties.name: mso-padding-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific padding shorthand applied to a table cell.

properties.name: mso-padding-top-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific top padding override.

properties.name: mso-padding-right-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific right padding override.

properties.name: mso-padding-bottom-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific bottom padding override.

properties.name: mso-padding-left-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific left padding override.

properties.name: mso-margin-top-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific top margin override.

properties.name: mso-margin-right-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific right margin override.

properties.name: mso-margin-bottom-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific bottom margin override.

properties.name: mso-margin-left-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific left margin override.

properties.name: mso-table-lspace
properties.description: Removes default left spacing Outlook applies to table elements. Almost always set to 0pt.

properties.name: mso-table-rspace
properties.description: Removes default right spacing Outlook applies to table elements. Almost always set to 0pt.

properties.name: mso-table-tspace
properties.description: Top spacing applied to a table by Outlook.

properties.name: mso-table-bspace
properties.description: Bottom spacing applied to a table by Outlook.

properties.name: mso-style-priority
properties.description: Controls the precedence of an embedded style declaration in Outlook 2007+.

properties.name: mso-style-name
properties.description: Names a style block so Outlook can reference it.

properties.name: mso-style-noshow
properties.description: Hides the style from the Word/Outlook style picker.

properties.name: mso-style-parent
properties.description: Declares the parent style this rule inherits from.

properties.name: mso-style-qformat
properties.description: Marks a style as Quick Format in Word.

properties.name: mso-style-type
properties.description: Declares the kind of style (paragraph, character, table, etc.).

properties.name: mso-style-unhide
properties.description: Forces the style to be visible in the picker even if hidden.

properties.name: mso-hide
properties.description: Hides the element from Word/Outlook display while keeping it in the document.

properties.name: mso-element
properties.description: Declares the Word/Outlook element type. `frame` lets you create a positioned text frame.

properties.name: mso-element-anchor-horizontal
properties.description: Horizontal anchor for an mso-element: frame.

properties.name: mso-element-anchor-vertical
properties.description: Vertical anchor for an mso-element: frame.

properties.name: mso-element-frame-height
properties.description: Frame height for an mso-element: frame.

properties.name: mso-element-frame-width
properties.description: Frame width for an mso-element: frame.

properties.name: mso-element-left
properties.description: Left position offset for an mso-element: frame.

properties.name: mso-element-top
properties.description: Top position offset for an mso-element: frame.

properties.name: mso-element-wrap
properties.description: Text wrapping mode around a frame.

properties.name: mso-position-horizontal
properties.description: Horizontal alignment of a positioned element.

properties.name: mso-position-horizontal-relative
properties.description: Reference frame for mso-position-horizontal.

properties.name: mso-position-vertical
properties.description: Vertical alignment of a positioned element.

properties.name: mso-position-vertical-relative
properties.description: Reference frame for mso-position-vertical.

properties.name: mso-width-percent
properties.description: Width expressed as a percentage scaled by 10 (1000 = 100%).

properties.name: mso-width-relative
properties.description: Reference for mso-width-percent.

properties.name: mso-height-percent
properties.description: Height as a percentage scaled by 10.

properties.name: mso-height-relative
properties.description: Reference for mso-height-percent.

properties.name: mso-special-format
properties.description: Special list/numbering format directive.

properties.name: mso-level-number-format
properties.description: Number format for a list level.

properties.name: mso-list
properties.description: Declares list metadata (level, list ID, ignore flag).

properties.name: mso-ascii-font-family
properties.description: ASCII font family override for Outlook.

properties.name: mso-fareast-font-family
properties.description: Far-East font family override for Outlook.

properties.name: mso-fareast-language
properties.description: Far-East language tag for Outlook spell-checking.

properties.name: mso-hansi-font-family
properties.description: High-ANSI font family override for Outlook.

properties.name: mso-bidi-font-family
properties.description: Bi-directional (RTL) font family override for Outlook.

properties.name: mso-ansi-font-size
properties.description: ANSI font size override for Outlook.

properties.name: mso-font-alt
properties.description: Alternative font name when the primary is unavailable.

properties.name: mso-font-charset
properties.description: Font charset code.

properties.name: mso-font-kerning
properties.description: Minimum point size at which kerning is applied.

properties.name: mso-font-pitch
properties.description: Font pitch (fixed or variable).

properties.name: mso-font-signature
properties.description: Hex font signature for charset coverage detection.

properties.name: mso-generic-font-family
properties.description: Generic CSS font-family fallback.

properties.name: mso-cellspacing
properties.description: Cell spacing applied between Outlook table cells.

properties.name: mso-border-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific border shorthand override.

properties.name: mso-border-top-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific top border override.

properties.name: mso-border-right-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific right border override.

properties.name: mso-border-bottom-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific bottom border override.

properties.name: mso-border-left-alt
properties.description: Outlook-specific left border override.
